HomeProgramsCoffee

Sustainable Coffee Production

Empowering households through high-value coffee farming with guaranteed support from seedling to market.

Coffee Program

From Seedling
to Cup

Our sustainable coffee production program is the cornerstone of Bugwere Coffee Company. We provide everything a farming household needs to establish and maintain a productive coffee farm — from premium seedlings and fertilizers to expert training and guaranteed market access.

Coffee is a high-value, long-term crop that provides steady income for families year after year, making it the ideal foundation for rural economic transformation. In the rich volcanic soils of Bugwere, our Arabica and Robusta varieties flourish under the careful guidance of our extension team, producing beans that command premium prices on international markets.

Key Facts

Homes Reached

5,000+

Seedling Varieties

3 Premium

Field Officers

45+

Yield Increase

+35%

How It Works

The Coffee Journey

Seedling Distribution

Premium coffee seedlings — carefully selected for disease resistance and yield potential — are delivered directly to your doorstep, free of charge. Each household receives enough seedlings to establish a commercially viable plot.

Planting & Training

Hands-on training from our field officers covers optimal planting techniques, spacing, shade management, and soil preparation. We ensure every farmer knows exactly how to give their seedlings the best possible start.

Ongoing Support

Regular farm visits and agronomic guidance continue throughout the growing cycle. From pruning to pest management, our team is there every step of the way, ensuring healthy trees and maximum productivity.

Harvest & Market

When your coffee is ready, our guaranteed buying program ensures you can sell at fair, transparent prices. No middlemen, no uncertainty — just a reliable market for your hard-earned harvest.

What We Provide

Program Highlights

Over 5,000 homes supplied with premium coffee seedlings

Guaranteed market access through our buying program

Expert agronomic training and ongoing field support

Processing and quality assurance at collection centers

Financial inclusion through community SACCO savings groups

Rural farmer insurance protecting against crop failure

3 Varieties

Disease-resistant Arabica and Robusta varieties selected for Bugwere's unique microclimate

3–5 Years

From planting to first harvest — then productive for 30+ years of steady income

Premium Price

Our processing and quality assurance ensures beans meet export-grade standards

Ready to Start Your
Coffee Farm?

Join thousands of households already benefiting from our coffee production program. From seedling to market, we are with you every step.
